2604.09251.title: DRBENCHER: Can Your Agent Identify the Entity, Retrieve Its Properties and Do the Math?
2604.09251.paper_summary: Deep research agents increasingly interleave web browsing with multi-step computation, yet existing benchmarks evaluate these capabilities in isolation, creating a blind spot in assessing real-world performance. We introduce DRBENCHER, a synthetic benchmark generator for questions that require both browsing and computation. It enforces four criteria: verifiability (gold answers are computed by executing parameterized code over knowledge-graph values), complexity (multi-hop entity identification, property retrieval, and domain-specific computation), difficulty (a two-stage verification cascade filters out questions solvable by the generating model), and diversity (a greedy max-min embedding filter maximizes coverage). These criteria are realized via a unified answer-first pipeline spanning five domains: biochemistry, financial, geophysical, security, and history. Human evaluation shows 76% validity (84% excluding stale data), with 35% of errors due to outdated knowledge-graph entries, highlighting an inherent limitation of systems that reason over evolving data. Automatic evaluation shows that the strongest frontier model achieves only 20% answer accuracy. Compared to manually constructed benchmarks (BrowseComp+, MATH-500, GPQA), DRBENCHER achieves the highest semantic diversity.
2604.09251.paper_summary_zh: 深度研究代理越來越多地將網頁瀏覽與多步計算交織在一起，但現有基準測試在孤立的情況下評估這些能力，造成在評估現實世界表現時的盲點。我們介紹了DRBENCHER，一個合成基準生成器，用於需要瀏覽和計算的問題。它強制執行四個標準：可驗證性（黃金答案是通過執行參數化代碼在知識圖譜值上計算得出的）、複雜性（多跳實體識別、屬性檢索和特定領域計算）、難度（兩階段驗證級聯過濾掉生成模型可解的問題）和多樣性（貪婪的最大-最小嵌入過濾器最大化覆蓋範圍）。這些標準通過一個統一的答案優先管道實現，涵蓋五個領域：生物化學、金融、地球物理、安全和歷史。人類評估顯示76%的有效性（排除過時數據後為84%），其中35%的錯誤是由於過時的知識圖譜條目，突顯了對於不斷演變數據進行推理的系統的固有限制。自動評估顯示，最強的前沿模型僅達到20%的答案準確率。與手動構建的基準（BrowseComp+、MATH-500、GPQA）相比，DRBENCHER實現了最高的語義多樣性。
2604.09251.author: Young-Suk Lee et.al.
2604.09251.authors: Young-Suk Lee, Ramon Fernandez Astudillo, Radu Florian
